name: STRATEGIC UPDATE
body_template:
{fleet} is advancing on {planet}.
{faction} pressure across {sector} is rising.

name: HIGH PRIORITY ALERT
body_template:
An immediate {enemy} threat has struck {planet}.
Without intervention, it falls.

name: MAJOR ORDER
body_template:
Liberate {planet} and break the {enemy} advance before {deadline}.
Reward: {reward}.

name: OPERATION SUCCESS
body_template: {planet} is secured. {faction} forces have broken the enemy hold.

name: OPERATION FAILURE
body_template:
{planet} has fallen to {enemy} forces.
{sector} is exposed. Regroup and counter-attack.

name: INTEL REPORT
body_template:
Survey teams on {planet} report {enemy} activity that defies current models.
Analysis ongoing; caution advised.

name: PROPAGANDA BROADCAST
body_template:
The cowardly {enemy} flee before us on {planet}.
For Super Earth, for Managed Democracy!
